title: Amazon SageMaker Model
description: Schema representing an Amazon SageMaker machine learning model resource.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model.

PrimaryContainer.description: The primary container for the model.

Containers.description: The containers in the inference pipeline.

ExecutionRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that SageMaker can assume to access model artifacts.

VpcConfig.description: A VPC configuration for the model.

Subnets.description: The ID of the subnets in the VPC.

EnableNetworkIsolation.description: Isolates the model container so that no inbound or outbound network calls can be made.

Tags.description: A list of key-value pairs associated with the model.

CreationTime.description: A timestamp that indicates when the model was created.

ContainerDefinition.description: Describes the container for a model.

ContainerHostname.description: The DNS host name for the container.

RepositoryAccessMode.description: Set this to Vpc to pull the image from a private Docker registry in your VPC.

Mode.description: Whether the container hosts a single model or multiple models.

ModelDataUrl.description: The S3 path where the model artifacts are stored.

Environment.description: Environment variables to set in the Docker container.

ModelPackageName.description: The name or ARN of the model package to use for inference.

Tag.description: A key-value pair for tagging SageMaker resources.
